<par>Cf. Lahu <latinform>ɔ̀-šɛ</latinform> ‘special portion; prime cut’ [DL 207] <latinform>⪤ ɔ̀-šɛ̄-phâ</latinform> (-<latinform>ma</latinform>) man's (woman's) body [DL 207] perhaps allofam of <reconstruction>*sǎ</reconstruction> <xref ref="34">#34</xref>.</par>
<par>What is this PC source? JAM says shource should be DQ-Dico. This may be part of a larger problem that needs to be addressed.\-</par>

<par>PC from Zev at STEDT. Not in GSR 704. This reconstruction is according to Karlgren's system. The character in question has the same reading as 704a except that the MC tone is shang-sheng.</par>

<par>PC from Zev at STEDT. Not in WHB. This reconstruction is according to Baxter's system. The character in question has the same reading as <latinform>sèmdash ang</latinform> 'mulberry' (which appears in his index of Shijing rhyme words) except that the MC tone is shang-sheng.</par>
